params.name: La Comédie humaine
params.description:
On Jun 29, 1665 AD, Balzac compiled his life's work into a book.
La Comédie humaine is a masterpiece composed of more than 90 novels by Balzac, showcasing the French society of the time. The content of Balzac's works can be roughly divided into three categories: the decline of feudal aristocracy, the rise of the bourgeoisie in society, and the tragedies caused by the money view. Balzac's works insight into the overall trend of social, political and economic thought development in France, digg …
